title: statute consumption-boundary and guardrail gate
scope: guard tests + docs only; no business behavior change
added_or_modified_files: 落地设计文档/20-E5法条检索分步骤系统提示词文档.md (E5-6 done note)

guard_coverage.g1_public_face_and_gated: statute public face present; ENABLE_STATUTE_SEARCH default false; 3 endpoints 403 when disabled
guard_coverage.g2_products_no_cross_import: statute not import intake/drafting/casebook; not imported by them (test_e2a append + boundaries)
guard_coverage.g3_no_deep_retrieval: statute not deep-import retrieval/rerank/summary/query_processing; must go via kernel.rag StatuteSearchService
guard_coverage.g4_only_intake_statute: only intake + statute product packages; no drafting/casebook
guard_coverage.g5_request_whitelist_forbid: 3 request schemas strict whitelist + extra=forbid; reject body/PII/raw-case/generated keys
guard_coverage.g6_statuteref_anchored: StatuteRef fields == E5-1 whitelist; 100% statute_anchors with text_id; no body/generated keys; article only from corpus
guard_coverage.g7_cross_jump_contract_only: statute->case yields CandidateRef (7-field whitelist, 100% source_anchors, 0 body); case->statute yields anchored StatuteRef; no opposite-side body
guard_coverage.g8_no_body_pii_no_persist: statute executable code/models/logs no body/PII tokens; no persistence layer
guard_coverage.g9_router_14_no_oob: include_router == 14 (intake + statute); no /api/internal or /api/ecosystem fragments; statute registers exactly 3 endpoints
guard_coverage.g10_index_isolation: statute collection != case collection; resolve_statute_persist_dir isolated; pipeline never writes case collection; statute code never opens case artifacts in write mode
guard_coverage.g11_no_long_body_fixtures: E5 test fixtures and e5-* docs max contiguous CJK <= 40
